headline: The Top 5 Analyst Questions From Paycom’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: Paycom’s first quarter results received a positive market reaction, underpinned by robust execution in automation and AI-enabled solutions. Management attributed the quarter’s momentum to strong client engagement, increased revenue retention, and operational efficiencies from expanding automation across its HR software platform.
